title: polystichum trapezoides
intro: Polystichum trapezoides, also known as the Chinese tassel fern, is a type of evergreen fern native to China and Southeast Asia, characterized by its distinctive trapezoid-shaped fronds. Traditionally, Polystichum trapezoides has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Polystichum trapezoides is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
